hero.heading: Gapflow and Twilio
hero.subheading: Automate SMS, voice, video, and programmable communications

documentation.title: Getting Started with Twilio
documentation.description: Connect Twilio to Gapflow and automate SMS, voice, video, and messaging workflows.

documentation.title: Programmable Messaging
documentation.description: Send SMS, MMS, and WhatsApp messages programmatically with delivery tracking and webhooks.

documentation.title: Voice & Video APIs
documentation.description: Build voice calling and video conferencing features with Twilio's programmable communications.

tutorials.title: SMS Notification System
tutorials.description: Build a complete SMS notification system with delivery tracking and two-way messaging.

tutorials.title: Two-Factor Authentication
tutorials.description: Implement secure 2FA using Twilio Verify for user authentication workflows.

tutorials.title: Voice IVR System
tutorials.description: Create an interactive voice response system with call routing and recording.

faqs.question: How do I connect Twilio?
faqs.answer: Use your Account SID and Auth Token from the Twilio Console. Purchase phone numbers for SMS and voice capabilities.

faqs.question: What messaging channels are supported?
faqs.answer: SMS, MMS, WhatsApp Business, Facebook Messenger, and more. Each channel has specific requirements and pricing.

faqs.question: Can I send international messages?
faqs.answer: Yes! Twilio supports SMS delivery to 180+ countries. Check country-specific regulations and carrier requirements.

faqs.question: How does pricing work?
faqs.answer: Pay-as-you-go for messages and calls. Pricing varies by destination country. No monthly fees, pay only for usage.

faqs.question: What about compliance?
faqs.answer: Twilio handles TCPA, GDPR, and carrier compliance. Use verified sender IDs and respect opt-out requests.

faqs.question: Can I use custom phone numbers?
faqs.answer: Purchase local, toll-free, or short code numbers. Support for vanity numbers and number porting available.

testimonials.quote: SMS notifications reach customers instantly. 98% delivery rate and sub-second latency worldwide.
testimonials.author: Maria Rodriguez

testimonials.quote: Two-factor authentication reduced fraud 90%. Twilio Verify handles everything seamlessly.
testimonials.author: Dr. James Chen

testimonials.quote: Voice IVR handles 50K+ calls daily. Intelligent routing and perfect call quality.
testimonials.author: Amanda Foster

testimonials.quote: WhatsApp Business API transformed customer engagement. Rich media and interactive messages work perfectly.
testimonials.author: Carlos Martinez

limits.title: API Rate Limits
limits.description: Generous rate limits for most endpoints. Enterprise accounts get higher limits. Use queuing for burst traffic.

limits.title: Message Throughput
limits.description: Varies by number type: Long code (1 msg/sec), Toll-free (3 msg/sec), Short code (100+ msg/sec).

limits.title: International Delivery
limits.description: Regulations and carrier restrictions vary by country. Some countries require sender registration.

limits.title: Concurrent Calls
limits.description: Default: 100 concurrent calls per account. Request increases for higher capacity needs.
